title: satureja graeca var. consentina
intro: Satureja graeca var. consentina, also known as Greek savory, is a subspecies of the Satureja graeca plant, a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Greek savory include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of digestive issues such as bloating and gas. Greek savory can be consumed as a tea, added to soups and salads, or used in herbal preparations like tinctures and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
